MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LO, LELAND COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-11-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#1 JUDGE:GEORGE CHOPPELAS; M.BRADY/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. 10:20AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN PRO PER, ALL SIX DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPIA, BERTHA MEJIA, TOMAS TAPIA, GUILLERMO SANTAMARIA, JUANJITA TAPIA, FERNANDO MEJIA, FERNANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1520 VISITACION AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-06-1998, LEASE FORFEITED
